title: Spark vLLM Recipe
description: Recipe configuration for deploying LLM models via vLLM.

container.description: Docker image name to use (e.g., vllm-node, vllm-node-mxfp4).

command.description: vLLM serve command template with {placeholder} interpolation.

description.description: Short description of what this recipe does.

model.description: HuggingFace model ID for --setup downloads (e.g., org/model-name).

cluster_only.description: Set to true if this model requires cluster mode (Ray distributed execution).

solo_only.description: Set to true if this model can only run on a single node.

mods.description: Mod paths or patches to apply (e.g., mods/some-patch).

defaults.description: Default CLI-overridable settings for the vLLM serve command.

port.description: Listen port for the vLLM serve endpoint.

tensor_parallel.description: Number of GPUs for tensor parallelism.

gpu_memory_utilization.description: Fraction of GPU memory to use for the model (0.0-1.0).

max_model_len.description: Maximum context length for the model.

max_num_batched_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens per batch.

env.description: Environment variables to pass into the container.
